name: Tuna The Cat
short_description: Inspired by side scrollers from the 80's and 90's, Tuna The Cat is a true jump style side scroller. With todays graphics and yesterdays playstyle it's a combination for fun. Jump, slide, and run your way through 20 stages of colorful 2.5D excitement.
detailed_description: Tuna The Cat is a colorful 2.5D side scroller with a retro play style. On a mission to recover his stolen tacos, you will help Tuna through 20 stages and 5 boss battles. Try to collect all the missing tacos for extra lives, trust me you will need them. In Tuna The Cat patience is key, with well timed jumps and slides you will have loads of fun helping Tuna.
